## Classes

### <a name="sicura"></a>`sicura`

Entry point for Sicura compliance management

#### Examples

##### 

```puppet
include sicura
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `sicura` class:

* [`classes`](#-sicura--classes)
* [`simp_classes`](#-sicura--simp_classes)

##### <a name="-sicura--classes"></a>`classes`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Classes to include for compliance management.  Note that any element
prefaced with `--` will be removed from the `Array`.

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-sicura--simp_classes"></a>`simp_classes`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

Classes to include for compliance management.  For compatibility with the
SIMP framework, this defaults to the value of `simp::classes`.  Note that
any element prefaced with `--` will be removed from the `Array`.

Default value:

```puppet
simplib::lookup(
    'simp::classes',
    {
      'value_type'    => Array[String[1]],
      'merge'         => 'unique',
      'default_value' => [],
    },
  )
```
